overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing nighttime exploration of a ruined urban amphitheater in Dogtown. The player walks past NPCs near a food stall and navigates through debris-filled concrete ruins illuminated by holographic advertisements, neon signs, and a prominent green laser beam.

large curved concrete wall of the abandoned stadium structure
scattered trash and rubble covering the ground

segments.scene_description: The clip begins at a food truck stall where two NPCs stand near the service window. The camera moves forward past them, transitioning from the sheltered truck area into a dark open space filled with concrete ruins and scattered debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned amphitheater with tiered concrete seating

agents.ego_description: navigating through the dark abandoned amphitheater past broken furniture and scattered debris

scattered broken tables and chairs abandoned on the ground
piles of trash and discarded items accumulated against the seating

segments.scene_description: Moving through the dark abandoned amphitheater, the camera navigates between broken wooden furniture and debris scattered across the concrete tiered seating. The area is dimly lit with only ambient light from the night sky, and a lone figure sits at a table in the shadows to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower amphitheater level with holographic advertisements

events.description: large holographic advertisement for 'BARGH' becomes visible on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking toward the holographic advertisements and green laser beam visible in the distance

various colorful neon signs and lights from distant buildings

segments.scene_description: As the camera moves deeper into the ruins, a large holographic advertisement for 'BARGH' appears on the left, illuminating the area with its glow. In the distance, a prominent green laser beam cuts through the night sky, while neon signs from the distant city become visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway under stadium overhang with campfires

approaches area with burning campfires casting warm orange light

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved elevated path with metal railings, approaching the campfire area

entered.detail: curved concrete walkway with metal safety railings on the edge
concrete roof structure overhead providing partial cover
burning fire pit with visible orange flames and glowing embers

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions onto an elevated walkway with metal railings, moving under the concrete overhang of the stadium structure. The lighting shifts as burning campfires come into view on the right, casting warm orange glow against the cool neon lights of the distant city.

scene_state.functional_zone: central plaza with decorated tower and string lights

events.description: large tower structure decorated with colorful string lights becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the large decorated tower structure at the center of the ruined plaza

entered.detail: tall tower wrapped with red, white, and green string lights in a spiral pattern
damaged concrete buildings surrounding the central plaza area
flying vehicles or drones visible in the night sky

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the camera approaches a large tower decorated with colorful string lights rising in the center of the ruined plaza. The green laser beam is now centered in the view, while flying vehicles can be seen in the night sky above the surrounding damaged buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban outpost into the expansive, neon-lit ruins of an abandoned amphitheater. It begins at a food truck stall where two NPCs stand by the service window, moving forward past them and transitioning into a dark open space filled with concrete debris. As the camera navigates through the tiered seating of the amphitheater, it passes broken wooden furniture and a lone figure sitting in the shadows under the dim ambient light of the night sky. The scene then opens up as the camera moves deeper into the ruins, where a large holographic advertisement for BARGH illuminates the surroundings with its glow. Finally, the view expands to reveal a prominent green laser beam cutting through the darkness while distant city neon signs flicker on the horizon.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered shadows of a concrete overhang into the expansive, neon-lit center of a ruined urban plaza. It begins on an elevated walkway with metal railings, moving beneath a heavy stadium structure where the lighting shifts as burning campfires emerge on the right, casting a warm orange glow against the cool city lights. As the camera exits the covered walkway, the view opens up to reveal a large tower adorned with colorful string lights rising from the debris. The scene then centers on a prominent green laser beam piercing the night sky, while flying vehicles glide above the surrounding damaged buildings.
